utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final solution includes all six of these items. Each is specified with appropriate details: (1) property includes address, price, currency, bedrooms, type, and key features; (2) financing contains detailed mortgage terms and amounts; (3) legal_services lists service name, cost, and currency; (4) moving_services lists service name, cost, and currency; (5) setup_services lists service name, cost, currency, and included features; (6) total_budget includes a full cost breakdown with all major components and totals. Therefore, all required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution identifies a purchase property located at 142 Heritage Lane, Toronto—a 3-bedroom townhouse with heritage status priced at CAD $750,000. In the ground-truth data, the only purchase property matching a CAD $750K character townhouse in a cultural district is 'Historic Townhouse' (rating 6).
